arts.ttl: What Luis Enrique Surprisingly Said About Marco Asensio’s Return Ahead of Aston Villa-PSG
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain will host Aston Villa on Wednesday night at Parc des Princes. This match marks the return of Marco Asensio, who joined the capital club just a few months ago. PSG advanced to the quarterfinals after a dramatic Round of 16 encounter with Liverpool, winning in a tense penalty shootout. Aston Villa’s path was […] The post What Luis Enrique Surprisingly Said About Marco Asensio’s Return Ahead of Aston Villa-PSG appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Team News: Paris Saint-Germain vs. Aston Villa injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's Champions League clash between Paris Saint-Germain and Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: 'The best news' - Unai Emery explains Marcus Rashford change after Man Utd transfer - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: Unai Emery says Marcus Rashford rediscovering his enjoyment for football is the “best news” Aston Villa can have. Aston Villa boss Unai Emery hailed Marcus Rashford ahead of the Champions League clash with Paris Saint-Germain

arts.ttl: PSG vs Aston Villa preview: Enrique 'delighted' Asensio can play for Villa
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain boss Luis Enrique has no issues with Marco Asensio facing his parent club in the Champions League quarter-final first leg with Aston Villa. UEFA rules state that loan players can play against their parent clubs in European competition, but Enrique is relaxed at the prospect of coming up against his player in Wednesday's first leg in the French capital.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford's best is still to come insists Unai Emery - as Aston Villa boss claims exiled Man United star has rediscovered his love of football
arts.sum: TOM COLLOMOSSE: Rashford joined Villa on loan last winter after effectively being exiled by Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim and he is slowly finding his feet again at Villa.

arts.ttl: Villa urge calm from PSG fans over Martínez feud
arts.sum: Aston Villa's Youri Tielemans has urged Paris Saint-Germain supporters to "stick to football" if they taunt goalkeeper Emiliano Martínez.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa star Emi Martinez repeats France jibe with subtle World Cup message
arts.sum: Emi Martínez appears to be embracing his role as ‘public enemy number one’ in France ahead of Aston Villa’s Champions League quarter-final clash with Paris Saint-Germain. “He is mature,” Emery said when asked about the cap.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa star reveals the real secret to Marco Asensio's success
arts.sum: Asked if Asensio’s work rate is an underrated part of his game, Tielemans said: “Probably, because when you look at him, you don’t think he is a hard worker in that sense where he is more so a ball-player. Marco Asensio will face his parent club in the Champions League on Wednesday night (8pm)

arts.ttl: Emiliano Martinez sends French fans a message as Aston Villa arrive in Paris
arts.sum: The Argentina goalkeeper wore a hat celebrating Argentina’s success while covering up a French cockerel emblem.

arts.ttl: 'I suggest Simon Jordan goes to see Aston Villa play after poor Marcus Rashford comment'
arts.sum: Simon Jordan has been slammed for saying signing Marcus Rashford would be too 'big a deal' for Aston Villa in the summer. 'I suggest Simon Jordan goes to see Aston Villa play after poor Marcus Rashford comment'
